author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas 2.1.9 OUT NOW

We're ending the year with a bang and just launched the closed access Star Atlas 2.1.9 update on the Epic Games Store! Test early game modes like a 3rd person shooter and combat racing against bots, view new final in-game ship models, and way more.

Read the full list of changes in the detailed patch notes: ⁠🩹┃patch-notes 

 | Watch the trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G6LVjV_58J8
 | Play or wishlist now: https://store.epicgames.com/en-US/p/star-atlas-bead34
